title: Non GATE CSE - Information Theory - Signal Processing

questions.question:
A bandlimited signal is sampled at the Nyquist rate. The signal can be recovered by passing the samples through :



Information Theory: NIELIT 2022 April Scientist B | Section B | Question: 93
options: an ideal low-pass filter with the appropriate bandwidth
questions.correct_answer: an ideal low-pass filter with the appropriate bandwidth
